"[33] 1039 SGT BALLANTYNE - RESIDENTS WERE NOTIFIED OF CLOSURE AND THERES SIGNAGE FOR DETOUR [Shared]"

"[31] [Notification] [CHP]-#23, 24 LN CT HAS A DETOUR IN PLACE, BUT TRAVELLERS ARE NOT FOLLOWING IT PROPERLY AND ARE ATTEMPTING TO ENTER THE FREEWAY, CAUSING TRAFFIC ISSUES. IF POSSIBLE, COULD AN OFFICER BE ASSIGNED TO THAT LOCATION TO HELP DIRECT TRAFFIC? [Shared]"
"[30] REQ "LOCAL TRAFFIC ONLY" SIGNAGE AT ROOKS/KELLA [Shared]"
"[27] REQ SIGNAGE ROOKS X KELLA - ONLY 1 ENTRANCE/EXIT TO NEIGHBORHOOD CAUSING TRAFFIC DELAYS DUE TO PECK ONR CLOSED [Shared]"
"[20] 83-Z2 #2 LN ON ROOKS CLOSED -- SIGNAGE IN AREA FOR ONR CLOSURE [Shared]"

"[19] RP REQ DETOUR SINGAGE TO KEEP TRFC OO NEIGHBORHOOD // ADVS TRFC COMING FROM MOTORISTS UNABLE TO ENTER ONR - THEY DO NOT KNOW WHERE TO GO TO TURN AROUND // COULD THER PLS BE SIGNS THAT SAY RESIDENTS ONLY - OR DETOUR SIGNS TAKING TRFC OO AREA [Shared]"
"[18] 83-Z2 THERE WILL SEPERATE CONSTRUCTION ON ROOKS RD CAUSING TRFC TO BACK UP [Shared]"

"[15] RP DETOUR THROUGH NEIGHBOOR- 1 LIGHT TO GET OUT // RP ADV VEHS ARE MOVING SLOW AND STREETS IN NEIGHBOOR HOOD VEHS ARE STUCK - NARROW - RP ADV VEHS ARE GOING IN CIRCLES TRYING TO GET OUT [Shared]"
"[12] [Appended, 17:08:41] [1] RP REQ CHP TO GUIDE TRFC / VEHS ARE STUCK NOW FROM CONSTRUCTION AND LKANES CLOSED OFF"
"[8] [Appended, 17:06:18] [2] RP REQ IF SIGNAGE CAN BE FIXED TO REDUCE TRAFFIC BUILD UP "
"[7] [Appended, 17:06:18] [1] RP ADVS CONSTRUCTION SIGNS NOT VISIBLE - CAUSING VEHICE TO ENTER RESEDENTIAL AREA // THIS CAUSING TRAFFIC TO BACK UP ON FELLA AVE"
"[6] REQ UNITS TO DIVERT TRAFFIC OR PUT UP SIGNS SO VEHS DO NOT ENTER THE RESIDENTIAL AREA AND BEING STUCK "
"[3] RP ADVS'G MULTI VEHS ARE TURNING INTO RESIDENTIAL AREA DUE TO ONR BEING SHUTDOWN "
